task: Prepare the dashboard reporting system for future mobile sync without implementing the mobile app.

linked_goal.reason: Mobile sync planning extends the dashboard reporting protocol while preserving .agent-dashboard as the source of truth.

summary: Added mobile sync planning and sync safety documentation without implementing cloud sync, backend storage, or a mobile app.

completed_work.title: Mobile sync plan
completed_work.evidence: Created docs/mobile-sync-plan.md covering source files, desktop viewer role, future Supabase-style backend, read-only mobile, sync entities, redaction, and conflict handling.

completed_work.title: Sync safety rules
completed_work.evidence: Created .agent-dashboard/protocol/sync-safety-rules.md with authority, redaction, conflict, parser, notification, private mode, and read-only mobile rules.

completed_work.title: Handoff update
completed_work.evidence: Updated HANDOFF.md with mobile sync notes and next steps.

remaining_work: Implement a local dashboard parser using report-schema.md.
Add sync-safety enforcement before any cloud sync.
Design a future Supabase schema if that backend is selected.
Build a read-only mobile app only after parser and sync agent behavior are implemented.

blockers.title: No sync implementation yet
blockers.details: Cloud sync and mobile app work should not start until parser, redaction, private mode, and authority rules are implemented.

blockers.title: Placeholder task details
blockers.details: The earlier placeholder implementation request remains blocked until actual task details are supplied.

verification.name: required_inputs_read
verification.details: Read report-schema.md, current-status.json, goals/main.yaml, and recent run reports before editing.

verification.name: requirements_coverage_review
verification.details: The plan and safety rules cover source files, desktop viewer, future cloud backend, read-only mobile, sync entities, redaction rules, private mode, and conflict handling.

verification.name: json_parse_check
verification.details: All JSON files under .agent-dashboard parsed successfully with PowerShell ConvertFrom-Json after mobile sync preparation.

verification.name: application_tests
verification.details: No application code exists and no cloud sync or mobile behavior was implemented.

next_recommended_prompts: Implement a dashboard parser that reads .agent-dashboard using protocol/report-schema.md and enforces protocol/sync-safety-rules.md without syncing to the cloud yet.

secret_handling.notes: No secrets, credentials, tokens, cookies, private keys, env files, or raw logs were added.
